pr.title: Record: 0.2292 BPB — Dirichlet-Multinomial Smoothing + Distributed Prefill + 15-Gram + EBLS

output.summary: Recursive Dirichlet-Multinomial smoothing mixes the neural LM prior with up to 15-gram counts via one global concentration, replacing heuristic multiplier tuning.
techniques: Neural LM serves as Dirichlet prior for hierarchical cache smoothing
Single global concentration controls tradeoff from bigrams to 15-grams
Distributed cache prefill complements the n-gram mixing pipeline
